STATIC SANDBOX

Command Center Sandbox Simulator

Run a safe simulated request through the Agent Command Center pipeline. Backend/Supabase readiness exists, live backend runtime is disabled, and this page stays local and read-only. This is a flight simulator, not the real aircraft. No backend calls. No writes. No execution. No automation.

PRODUCTION VERIFIED THROUGH MVP-62 BACKEND/SUPABASE READINESS PRESENT LIVE BACKEND RUNTIME DISABLED NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_AUTOMATION
Back to Demo Hub Open Live Dashboard Safety Boundaries

Current scenario

SAFE CONTENT REVIEW

A stakeholder asks the command center to review a piece of content for safety and clarity before sharing.

READY FOR HUMAN REVIEW SIMULATION ONLY

What this proves

The simulator is local and in-memory only. It demonstrates the readiness pipeline without sending data anywhere.

  • STATIC SANDBOX
  • PRODUCTION VERIFIED THROUGH MVP-62
  • BACKEND/SUPABASE READINESS PRESENT
  • LIVE BACKEND RUNTIME DISABLED
  • NOT_READY_FOR_REAL_AUTOMATION
  • No backend calls
  • No writes
  • No execution
  • No automation
  • No Supabase mutation
  • No alert sending
  • No rollback execution

Scenario chooser

Choose a simulated request

Each scenario uses the same static pipeline, but the stage results and final status reflect a different stakeholder request.

Pipeline

Auth → Storage → Audit → Approval → Dry Run → Queue → Human Review → Monitoring Readiness

This is the readiness flow, not an enabled execution flow.

Controls

Run the simulation

All controls are local. They only update the browser view and copy static text.

Simulation summary

READY_FOR_HUMAN_REVIEW_SIMULATION_ONLY

The simulator is initialized and ready.

Stage progress

0 / 8

No stages have been run yet.

Mock log

In-memory only

Safety boundary

What this simulator does not enable

Backend/Supabase readiness exists, but live backend runtime, writes, endpoints, service-role usage, and runtime mutation flows stay disabled until explicit runtime activation approval.

Disabled capabilities

  • No command execution.
  • No action execution.
  • No public writes or Supabase writes.
  • No backend calls.
  • No writes.
  • No execution.
  • No automation.
  • No Supabase mutation.
  • No alert sending.
  • No rollback execution.
  • No alert sending, rollback execution, or incident mutation.

Runtime boundary

  • Service role is not exposed to the browser.
  • Runtime activation has not started.
  • This page is static, local, and read-only.
  • The simulator stays local and does not invoke live backend runtime.

© 2026 Devin O’Rourke. All rights reserved.

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.

Third-party names, platforms, and services referenced for context remain the property of their respective owners.
